title: pavonia leiocarpa
intro: Pavonia leiocarpa, also known as the rock rose or coral mallow, is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Pavonia leiocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as a decoction, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
